name: Draghig, Malebranche of the Burning Abyss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>彼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>岸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ドラゴネル
desc:
If you control a monster that is not a "Burning Abyss" monster, destroy this card. You can only use 1 of these effects of "Draghig, Malebranche of the Burning Abyss" per turn, and only once that turn.
● If you control no Spell/Trap Cards: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
● If this card is sent to the Graveyard: You can choose 1 "Burning Abyss" card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck.

mentions: Draghig, Malebranche of the Burning Abyss
action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
